message:
feat(lipgloss): Add StyleRanges API and unset methods for style composition

Implements two major feature additions to reach parity with Go lipgloss:

1. StyleRanges API (lipgloss/lib.rs):
   - `Range` struct for specifying styled text sections
   - `new_range()` helper function for ergonomic range creation
   - `style_ranges()` function to apply different styles to string ranges
   - Respects existing ANSI escape sequences in input text

2. Unset methods (lipgloss/style.rs):
   - Full suite of `unset_*` methods to remove individual style rules
   - Includes: bold, italic, underline, strikethrough, reverse, blink, faint
   - Color properties: foreground, background
   - Dimension properties: width, height, max_width, max_height
   - Padding and margin: individual sides and all-sides variants
   - Border: individual sides and all-sides
   - Layout: horizontal_align, vertical_align, inline, color_whitespace
   - Enables style inheritance patterns where child styles selectively
     override parent properties

These additions enable more sophisticated text styling workflows and
improve API compatibility with the original Go implementation.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
